decks.notes: This deck focuses on using Replenish to bring back enchantments that have been placed in the graveyard, such as Opalescence and Parallax Wave, to create a powerful board presence. It also utilizes cards like Attunement and Intuition to set up the combo and disrupt opponents with counterspells like Mana Leak and Decree of Silence. The deck aims to control the board with removal like Swords to Plowshares and Seal of Cleansing while maintaining card advantage through cards like Frantic Search.

This deck focuses on quickly applying pressure on the opponent through aggressive creature plays and disruption spells. By utilizing cards like Cabal Therapy, Duress, and Hypnotic Specter, it aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while maintaining a steady stream of threats on the board. With efficient creatures like Nantuko Shade and Mishra's Factory, along with removal spells like Diabolic Edict and Smother, this deck aims to overwhelm the opponent and close out the game before they can stabilize. Additionally, the inclusion of Wasteland helps to disrupt the opponent's mana base and further hinder their game plan.

This Goblins deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive tribal strategy. Key cards like Goblin Lackey and Goblin Matron provide valuable card advantage while Goblin Warchief and Goblin King boost the power of the tribe. With a mix of efficient creatures and disruptive elements like Wasteland and Rishadan Port, this deck aims to quickly build a board presence and close out games before the opponent has a chance to stabilize. The deck's focus on speed and synergy make it a formidable force in the Premodern 1 vs 1 format.

This deck focuses on controlling the game through a combination of counter spells, removal, and land denial. By using cards like Counterspell, Swords to Plowshares, and Wrath of God, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while staying ahead on board presence with cards like Mishra's Factory and Faerie Conclave. Standstill is used as a way to draw cards while forcing the opponent to make the first move. The deck also utilizes land destruction with cards like Dust Bowl and Wasteland to further limit the opponent's resources.

The main concept of this deck is to use Enchantresses to draw cards every time an enchantment is played, while ramping up mana with cards like Wild Growth and Serra's Sanctum. The deck focuses on using enchantments like Opalescence and Parallax Wave to create powerful board states and control the game. Card advantage and synergy between enchantments are crucial to effectively execute the combo strategy, ultimately leading to overwhelming the opponent with a combination of powerful enchantments.

The main focus of this Mono Black Aggro deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures like Nantuko Shade and Hypnotic Specter, while disrupting their hand and game plan with cards like Duress and Cabal Therapy. The deck also aims to control the board with removal spells like Smother and Diabolic Edict, while maintaining card advantage with Graveborn Muse. The mana base is designed for consistency and to support the deck's aggressive game plan, with Mishra's Factory and Wasteland adding additional utility.

The main focus of this Mono Black Aggro deck is to apply early pressure on the opponent with efficient and disruptive creatures like Hypnotic Specter and Knight of Stromgald, supported by removal spells like Smother and Diabolic Edict. The deck also aims to disrupt the opponent's hand through cards like Cabal Therapy and Duress. With Mishra's Factory providing a resilient creature and additional threats like Nantuko Shade and Graveborn Muse, this deck aims to maintain control of the game while chipping away at the opponent's life total.

This deck aims to quickly assemble the combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to create a powerful threat while denying the opponent's resources. The deck packs a lot of counterspells and cantrips to protect the combo and dig for key pieces. Tsabo's Web and Powder Keg provide additional disruption against the opponent's strategies, while Daze and Foil offer alternate ways to protect the combo. The core strategy revolves around leveraging the synergy between Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to overwhelm opponents before they can mount a defense.

The deck focuses on using aggressive creatures to apply early pressure on the opponent while also utilizing land destruction and Armageddon effects to disrupt their game plan. The key strategy is to play threats like Terravore and Call of the Herd while also using cards like Cataclysm and Wasteland to keep the opponent off balance. The deck aims to control the board and limit the opponent's resources, ultimately overwhelming them with efficient creatures and powerful removal spells.

This Goblin aggro deck focuses on flooding the board with cheap, aggressive creatures like Goblin Lackey, Goblin Piledriver, and Mogg Fanatic, all supported by powerful tribal synergies from cards like Goblin Warchief and Goblin Ringleader. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent quickly with efficient creatures and disruptive cards like Wasteland and Rishadan Port to control the board and push through damage. The deck is streamlined and focused on aggressive plays, looking to win the game before the opponent can stabilize their defenses.

The main focus of this Goblins deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive playstyle. The deck includes a variety of Goblin creatures, such as Goblin Lackey, Goblin Piledriver, and Goblin Warchief, which can quickly flood the board and deal damage. Cards like Goblin Ringleader and Siege-Gang Commander provide card advantage and additional threats. The deck also includes disruption cards like Wasteland and Gempalm Incinerator to control the opponent's resources. Overall, the key concept is to swarm the battlefield with Goblins and apply pressure to win the game quickly.

This deck focuses on using Ill-Gotten Gains to recycle key combo pieces like Lion's Eye Diamond and Brain Freeze. By generating large amounts of mana through rituals and fast mana sources, the deck can quickly assemble the necessary cards to cast Brain Freeze and mill the opponent's entire library. The deck includes card draw and selection spells to find combo pieces, while also including disruption like Tormod's Crypt and Chain of Vapor to prevent the opponent from interfering with the combo. The key strategy is to assemble the combo pieces quickly and efficiently to win the game in a single turn.

The deck focuses on assembling a powerful combo using cards like Hermit Druid, Krosan Reclamation, and Animate Dead to quickly fill the graveyard, reanimate key creatures, and generate infinite mana to win the game. It utilizes a variety of graveyard manipulation and card draw spells to set up the combo while also disrupting the opponent's game plan with cards like Cabal Therapy and Duress. The deck aims to win the game in a single explosive turn, often catching the opponent off guard and securing victory.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy utilizing low-cost creatures and disruption spells. By combining efficient threats like Hypnotic Specter and Nantuko Shade with disruption spells like Cabal Therapy and Duress, the deck aims to control the board while reducing the opponent's resources. Additionally, cards like Phyrexian Arena provide card advantage to ensure a steady stream of threats. Overall, the deck's goal is to apply pressure early and maintain it throughout the game, ultimately leading to a swift victory.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly and aggressively deal damage to the opponent. It includes low-cost, efficient creatures like Mogg Fanatic and Jackal Pup, along with powerful burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Fireblast. The goal is to keep up the pressure and finish off the opponent with direct damage spells like Ball Lightning and Sulfuric Vortex. This deck aims to win the game as quickly as possible by overwhelming the opponent with a constant stream of damage.

This deck aims to quickly ramp up mana and disrupt the opponent's lands with cards like Wasteland and Armageddon. It then utilizes creatures like Terravore and Nimble Mongoose to put pressure on the opponent and close out the game. The deck also includes some utility spells like Swords to Plowshares and Gemstone Mine to control the board and gain card advantage. Overall, the strategy is to overwhelm the opponent with efficient creatures and land destruction while maintaining a steady stream of threats.
